suggestionMap.Needs improvement in aptitude skills: Practice aptitude sets daily and review quantitative shortcuts.
suggestionMap.Needs industry exposure: Complete certifications from Coursera, NPTEL, or similar trusted platforms.
suggestionMap.Insufficient practical exposure: Build 2-3 real-world projects using modern tech stacks and deploy them.
suggestionMap.Critical practical exposure gap: Start with guided mini-projects, then move to one end-to-end major project.
suggestionMap.Lacks system-level development skills: Work on backend APIs, databases, and deployment fundamentals.
suggestionMap.Weak problem-solving exposure: Solve 2-3 DSA problems daily on platforms like LeetCode.
suggestionMap.Low attendance and discipline concern: Improve attendance consistency and maintain a structured weekly schedule.
suggestionMap.Multiple active backlogs impact placemen: Prioritize backlog clearance alongside placement preparation.
suggestionMap.Academic consistency issue: Review recent semester performance and strengthen weak core subjects.
suggestionMap.Poor portfolio visibility: Add GitHub repositories with clean README files and live demos where possible.
suggestionMap.Communication needs structured practice: Participate in mock interviews, presentations, and group discussions.
